response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web software engineer but lacks the core qualifications for a Principal Performance Architect role focused on AI accelerator hardware. No experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, deep learning workload optimization, GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture, or chip-level performance analysis. Background is primarily web, mobile, and backend services in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not hardware or AI accelerator architecture. Educational requirements also not met for a Principal IC role in this domain.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, and embedded contexts
Some low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby (high-throughput services in DLang)
Demonstrated initiative through open source, talks, and workshops
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or chip architecture experience
No deep learning, GPU, SIMD/MIMD, or AI accelerator workload optimization background
Education and experience profile does not match Principal-level hardware architect requirements

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / hardware architecture expertise
No SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design experience
